steps.title: Set up the cost equation
steps.content:
Let $m$ = number of mystery snails. The total cost equals cost of mystery snails plus cost of ramshorn snails:
$$9m + 7(3) = 66$$

steps.title: Solve for m
steps.content:
Simplify the left side:
$$9m + 21 = 66$$
Subtract 21:
$$9m = 45$$
Divide by 9:
$$m = 5$$
A is correct.
